---
title: "Markdown & RMarkdown"
id: activity-gis-reproducible-research-r
order: 301
summary: "Markdown and RMarkdown provide an efficient concept to create and publish scientific content."
source_url: "https://thinking-spatial.org/courses/geoinformationen_kommunizieren/kurs5/"
modules:
  - gis-reproducible-research
Goals: []
materials:
  - material-gis-reproducible-research-intro
assessments: []
labels:
  - basic
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/gis-reproducible-research/activity-gis-reproducible-research-r.md"
---

Open the Markdown and RMarkdown resource:

<https://thinking-spatial.org/courses/geoinformationen_kommunizieren/kurs5/>

## Connected Module

- [Reproducible Research](../modules/gis-reproducible-research.qmd)
